creator: fbsd-security@ursine.com
text:
The file /etc/mail/virtusertable.sample includes a comment that refers
to /etc/mail/sendmail.cw, but that filename as referenced in sendmail.cf
is now /etc/mail/local-host-names.  The comment should be updated to
match the new filename.

Fix: 

s/sendmail.cw/local-host-names/
How-To-Repeat: n/a
